introText: The Prhyme Minister (PM) is one of London's finest DJs, an award-winning radio host, rap artist, and event promoter with over a decade of influence across Afro-urban music and nightlife culture.
body:
Early 2000s – a pioneer of Pidgin rap style – one half of the legendary Hiplife group, KgPM. A style that later gained widespread popularity across African and diaspora music scenes. Known for his witty lyricism and cultural storytelling, PM is currently working on his solo album, featuring the singles "Yee-Titi-Yee" and "Make Your Mind Dey".

As a DJ, PM hosted an award-winning radio show on Rainbow Radio International for over 12 years, building a loyal audience across the UK and Ghana. His DJ sets are known for seamless genre blending, crowd reading, and cross-cultural appeal.

Beyond music, PM is an accomplished event promoter and curator. He hosts one of London's most successful annual boat parties, bringing together diverse audiences to celebrate African and global music, culture, and nightlife.

timeline.event: Released singles "Yee-Titi-Yee" and "Make Your Mind Dey"
Annual London Boat Party - Biggest event yet
Established as one of London's premier event curators
Award-winning radio show host on Rainbow Radio International for 12+ years
Pioneer of Pidgin rap style; one half of the legendary Hiplife group, KgPM

bookingText: Available for club nights, festivals, private events and collaborations
